new_value: Docs sync complete: 9 commits, 15 files, PG18, env vars synced, 3-agent peer review.

{"description":"Auto-detect SRG from spreadsheet instead of requiring manual selection.

## Problem
When importing a component from CSV/XLSX, the user must manually select which SRG from a dropdown, even though the spreadsheet has an SRGID column (e.g., "SRG-OS-000480-GPOS-00227").

## Solution
Parse SRGID column from spreadsheet → look up SrgRule by version → get parent SecurityRequirementsGuide → auto-populate the SRG dropdown.

## Implementation Plan (TDD)

### Backend
1. Add `SpreadsheetParser.peek_srg_ids(file)` static method — reads SRGID column without full parse
   - Reuse `open_spreadsheet` + `normalize_headers` (refactor to class methods if needed)
   - Return array of first N SRGID values
2. Add `detect_srg` action to ComponentsController
   - Accepts uploaded file, calls peek_srg_ids
   - Looks up: `SrgRule.where(version: srg_ids.first).first&.security_requirements_guide`
   - Returns JSON: `{ id, srg_id, title, version }`
   - Handle: no match, ambiguous match (multiple SRGs), file parse error
3. Add route: `POST /components/detect_srg`

### Frontend
4. NewComponentModal.vue — when `spreadsheet_import` mode + file selected:
   - POST file to `/components/detect_srg`
   - On success: auto-populate SRG dropdown, show "Detected: [SRG title]" indicator
   - On failure: fall back to manual selection (dropdown stays enabled)
   - Loading state while detection runs

### Tests
5. SpreadsheetParser spec: test peek_srg_ids with valid/invalid/empty spreadsheets
6. Request spec: test detect_srg endpoint (auth, success, no match, ambiguous)
7. Vue component test: auto-populate on file select, fallback on error

## Files
- `app/services/spreadsheet_parser.rb` — add peek_srg_ids
- `app/controllers/components_controller.rb` — add detect_srg action
- `config/routes.rb` — add route
- `app/javascript/components/components/NewComponentModal.vue` — auto-detect UX
- `spec/services/spreadsheet_parser_spec.rb` — peek tests
- `spec/requests/components_spec.rb` — endpoint tests

## Gotchas
- SpreadsheetParser currently requires srg_id at construction — peek needs separate path
- Multiple SRGs could share rule version IDs (defensive: check all IDs resolve to same SRG)
- File sent twice (detection + import) — acceptable UX tradeoff for small files
- Must still validate server-side on actual import (already happens in parse_and_validate)

## LOE: ~4 hours (half day)"}

{"id":"vulcan-clean-ilq","title":"Auto-detect SRG from spreadsheet instead of requiring manual selection","description":"User feedback: When importing component from spreadsheet, the modal requires manually selecting which SRG it's based on, even though the spreadsheet has an 'SRG ID' column.

Expected behavior:
- Parse SRG ID column from spreadsheet
- Auto-detect which SRG from database
- Pre-select it in the modal (or skip selection entirely)

Current behavior:
- User must manually select SRG from dropdown
- Annoying when SRG ID is already in the data

File: Component import modal (NewComponentModal.vue or similar)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lippold@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-13T14:19:11Z","created_by":"Aaron Lippold","updated_at":"2026-02-19T18:37:21Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"notes":"## v2.3.1 Release Plan (Updated 2026-02-27)

### Release Path
1. ✅ xtx — Classification/sensitivity banner + consent modal
2. ✅ 3y0 — Per-part rule field locking
3. ✅ ibo — Unify password complexity
4. ✅ 1ie — Quick security wins (rack-attack, XXE, limits, CSP, configurable input limits)
5. ✅ r4d — Docs sync (9 commits, 15 files, PG18, env vars, 3-agent peer review)
6. ⏳ q79h → 5wi — Live test XLSX locked cells → close CSV/XLSX round-trip (~30 min)
7. ○ ilq — Auto-detect SRG from spreadsheet (~4 hours TDD)
8. ○ m01n — Final test suite + linting + security scan + tag v2.3.1

### Done Criteria
- All 8 tasks closed (6 original + 2 release tasks)
- All tests pass (backend + frontend)
- All linting clean (RuboCop + ESLint)
- Security clean (Brakeman + bundler-audit)
- Live tested
- Tagged v2.3.1
- Release notes updated

### Estimated Remaining: ~5 hours total
- XLSX live test: 30 min
- ilq implementation (TDD): 4 hours
- Release checklist: 30 min"}

{"id":"vulcan-clean-5wi","title":"CSV/XLSX round-trip: export, edit, re-import to update component","description":"Ensure CSV/XLSX round-trip works for the primary authoring workflow:

1. User exports component as CSV or Excel (working_copy mode)
2. User edits rules in Excel/Google Sheets (bulk edits)
3. User re-imports the spreadsheet to UPDATE the existing component

## Acceptance Criteria
- Export CSV/XLSX → edit → re-import updates existing rules (not just creates new component)
- Field mapping alignment: export headers match import expectations (or aliases handle it)
- Satisfaction relationships preserved through round-trip
- InSpec control body preserved if present
- No data loss on round-trip for editable fields

## Out of Scope
- JSON Archive round-trip (already complete, machine-to-machine only)
- XCCDF round-trip (read-only reference format)
- InSpec import (separate card: vulcan-clean-9du)

## Current State (2026-02-19)
- CSV header aliases exist (vulcan-clean-bru, fixed in f54d67a)
- Spreadsheet import creates NEW components via NewComponentModal
- UNKNOWN: Can spreadsheet import UPDATE an existing component's rules?
- Need to verify: does re-importing a spreadsheet into the same component merge/update rules?","notes":"[2026-02-23] Merged feat/5wi-csv-roundtrip into v2.3.1 (7 commits FF). All docs synced and peer-reviewed (3 agents). PG18 standardized. {"notes":"[2026-02-27] Backend TDD complete:
- SpreadsheetParser.peek_srg_ids class method — reads SRGID column without full validation
- ComponentsController#detect_srg action — POST /components/detect_srg
- Route added, authorize_logged_in before_action
- 15/15 tests GREEN (7 unit + 8 request), all existing tests pass

Review findings to address next session:
1. DRY: Extract shared normalize_headers_for_rows private class method (header normalization duplicated between peek_srg_ids and instance normalize_headers)
2. Security: Add before_action upload validation (size/type check) for detect_srg
3. Query optimization: Use pluck(:security_requirements_guide_id) instead of loading SrgRule records
4. Observability: Add Rails.logger.warn in rescue block
5. Frontend: Wire up NewComponentModal.vue auto-detect on file select

Files changed:
- app/services/spreadsheet_parser.rb (peek_srg_ids)

- config/routes.rb (POST /components/detect_srg)
